landing.subtitle.line1: 21 plug-and-play AI departments + a Marketplace for more.
landing.card.business.title: For Business
landing.card.business.line: Hire 21 AI departments. Pay by usage.
landing.card.business.body: B + G + team workspace. Subscribe to an end-to-end AI company; billed by usage.
landing.card.solo.title: For Solo
landing.card.solo.line: Run a 1-person AI company. Stripe self-checkout.
landing.card.solo.body: C-side / super-individual. Lightweight onboarding, 3-department starter pack.
landing.card.builders.title: For Builders
landing.card.builders.line: Publish your AI department. Earn 97% of subscriptions.
landing.card.builders.body: Publish departments to the Marketplace. 3% flat platform fee.
business.landing.headline: Hire 21 AI departments. Pay by usage.
business.landing.body: B + G + team workspace. Subscribe to first-party and third-party departments from the Marketplace; billed by token usage. Includes Org Canvas, conversations, billing, approvals, and role management.

solo.landing.headline: Run a 1-person AI company.
solo.landing.body: C-side / super-individual entry. Default 3-department lightweight pack (template-solo-assistant). Stripe self-checkout. Billed by token usage.
dev.landing.headline: Publish your AI department. Earn 97%.
dev.landing.body.prefix: Builder workspace. Draft a department in the Wizard → edit SOUL / AGENTS in the Web IDE → sandbox preview → submit for review → publish. Third-party subscription revenue:
dev.landing.body.split: 97% to the developer, 3% to the platform
